chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. A. No. 571 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of case 13.08.2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Khan, Advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Noonari, DPG ---------- Reports submitted by DSP Legal East Zone, Karachi and SDPO Malir City, Sub-Division, Malir Karachi, are taken on record. Counsel for applicant submits that he does not press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Ashraf
